title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at RBI

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at RBI
jsonLd.description:
We at RBI are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About RBI:
RBI is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RBI!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
